articles.title: Crude oil prices fall as shipments through Strait of Hormuz resume; Brent oil below $75 a barrel
articles.description: Crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz increased this week to their highest level since the US-Iran war began in February after a ceasefire deal reopened the waterway, data showed.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel prices today - 26 June: Fuel rate in Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, Bengaluru, other cities as oil edges lower
articles.description: Petrol, diesel prices today — 26 June: Crude oil prices plunged on Friday morning amid easing supply concerns as more stranded oil tankers exited the Strait of Hormuz. Check fuel rate in Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, Bengaluru, other cities.

articles.title: Oil edges lower amid resumption of strait shipments even as vessel hit near Oman
articles.description: Oil prices are poised for significant weekly declines as supply worries ease with tankers navigating the Strait of Hormuz. Despite a cargo vessel being struck near Oman, with Iran implicated, and earthquakes in Venezuela causing minor infrastructure damage, crude shipments through the vital waterway have increased. However, lingering geopolitical tensions and power outages in Venezuela could still impact future production.

articles.title: Oil edges lower amid resumption of strait shipments even as vessel hit near Oman
articles.description: Oil prices fell on Friday morning and are heading for steep weekly losses amid easing supply concerns as more stranded ​oil tankers exited the Strait of Hormuz, even though a cargo vessel was ‌hit near Oman on Thursday.

articles.title: NIKKEI, KOSPI lead losses in Asia amidst volatile moves in tech stocks
articles.description: Oil prices remained in focus after Brent crude rose on Thursday following a projectile strike on a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, snapping a three-day losing streak. However, crude prices edged lower during early Asian trading.

articles.title: Oil prices hold gains post attack on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Brnet crude was trading near $75 a barrel, while West Texas Intermediate was below $72 a barrel.

articles.title: Diesel, gasoline prices likely to increase next week
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — Diesel and gasoline prices are estimated to increase next week due to the uncertainty in the Middle East despite a recent peace deal between US and Iran, local oil industry sources said on Friday.

articles.title: President Trump is frustrated gas prices don’t mirror oil’s decline
articles.description: President Trump, who wants to stave off the economic fallout of the war ahead of midterm elections, is now pointing at oil companies as the culprit.

articles.title: Cooling crude prices drive weekly gains; Street expects Q2 earnings recovery
articles.description: Indian stock markets closed slightly higher on Thursday, marking a third consecutive week of gains, buoyed by falling crude oil prices. The Nifty 50 and Sensex both edged up, with easing oil prices boosting investor confidence. Analysts suggest dips may attract buying, anticipating improved corporate margins from the second quarter, even with potential monsoon deficits. Volatility expectations also decreased.
